name: reviews-reputation-review-submission-gateway
description: T169 ReviewSubmissionGateway — TRANSACTION archetype. Eligibility check at order=1 before any write. Rating validation at order=2 before SETNX. Inverts FLOW-08 T79 audit-first pattern.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: eligibility-before-setnx, validation-before-setnx, server-derived-review-id, audit-at-order-4
Retrieve TRANSACTION arch pattern for T169: eligibility-before-audit, server-side-calculation
Break T169 into: eligibility(1) → rating-validate(2) → SETNX(3) → audit(4) → storeDocument+emit(5)

Generate review-submission-gateway.service.ts — eligibility FIRST, then rating validation, then SETNX idempotency. reviewId = SHA-256 hash(tenantId+reviewerId+targetEntityId+targetEntityType) server-derived.
Named check validation: eligibility_before_setnx, validation_before_setnx, server_derived_review_id, audit_after_eligibility
Score generated code 0-100 against T169 iron rules: eligibility order, rating validation order, SETNX position, audit position
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=eligibility-before-audit, rejected=audit-first-then-eligibility (FLOW-08 T79 pattern). curriculumTier=2.
